notes: Wave A4 proposals for 5 missing WC26 teams. Conservative by design — only consensus top-flight headline names. Teams with no real tier-1 international (Haiti, Curacao) intentionally omitted rather than fabricated. TIER_TO_ELO from scripts/live/injury_adjustments.py:38-43 — tier_1_star=-30.0, tier_1_keeper=-25.0, tier_2_starter=-12.0, tier_3_squad=-4.0. Unknown replacement → tier_3_squad with elo_equiv=-3.2 (i.e. -4.0*0.8). Squad-value top-20 cutoff (~Switzerland €334M) — none of these 5 teams qualify for tier_1_keeper.

Panama.name: Michael Amir Murillo
Panama.reason: Beşiktaş right-back; nailed starter since Feb-2026 move from Marseille; primary defensive/attacking wide outlet

Panama.name: Adalberto Carrasquilla
Panama.reason: Pumas UNAM (Liga MX) playmaker; described as Panama's creative engine connecting defence and attack

South Africa.name: Lyle Foster
South Africa.reason: Burnley striker (Premier League 25/26); only British-based player in squad; 10 goals in 29 caps as lead forward

New Zealand.name: Chris Wood
New Zealand.reason: Nottingham Forest (Premier League) striker; captain; all-time NZ top scorer; only NZ player to feature at two WCs (with Tommy Smith)
